title: Hurricane Idalia (Taylor Big Bend recent benchmark)
benchmark_focus: Recent Big Bend benchmark for rural county storm impacts, mixed wind/water narratives, and current-source retrieval quality.
key_facts: The property was exposed to hurricane-force winds and coastal flooding conditions during Idalia's Big Bend landfall.
The insured reported roof damage, broken openings, and rapid interior water intrusion immediately after the storm.
The carrier estimate omitted portions of exterior and interior scope that the public adjuster tied to wind-driven loss.
notes: Use this benchmark to test recent-source retrieval quality and rural-county evidence coverage after major Florida landfalls.
Carrier remains a stable default homeowners benchmark rather than a scenario-specific litigation dependency.
